title: The Firing That Changed Everything
content:
January 24, 1974. I remember the cold. I remember the drive to the office.

I walked into that boardroom at 44 years old, thinking I'd survive. I had devoted 23 years to that company. I was the heir apparent.

I walked out unemployed.

My wife looked me straight in the eye and said, 'Jack, this is the best thing that ever happened to you.'

I thought she was crazy. She was right.

Vanguard was born from that firing. Everything good in my career came from the worst day.
